title: dolicholobium longifructum
intro: Dolicholobium longifructum is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, commonly known as a type of gesneriad. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dolicholobium longifructum include its ability to aid in the treatment of various health issues, such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The plant is typically prepared as an herbal infusion or decoction, often combined with other medicinal plants, to create a remedy for these ailments.
